items.title: Amazon’s $12B Globalstar Acquisition Paid for Itself 10x Over in One Day
items.impact_rationale: Amazon's acquisition of Globalstar represents a significant strategic shift that has already resulted in a substantial increase in market capitalization.

items.title: Fair Isaac (FICO) Is Down 15.4% After Rising Regulatory Heat On FICO Pricing And AI Rivals - Has The Bull Case Changed?
